programs.title: NHK Newsline
programs.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programs.title: CBC The National
programs.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programs.title: BBC News At Six
programs.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programs.title: France 24 English News
programs.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw Bitesize
programs.desc: Join host Adam Liaw and all your favourite chefs, cooks and celebrities for the best bits from The Cook Up kitchen.

programs.title: NITV News Update
